name: Edamame and snow pea salad
intro: Edamame beans (also known as soybeans) are usually bought frozen and are useful to have in reserve in the freezer. Here, they are dished up in a bright salad and drizzled with a tangy sweet chili dressing.
method: Place the edamame beans in a large pot of boiling water for 3 minutes. Add the green beans and snow peas, and cook for 2 minutes. Drain, refresh under cold running water and then drain again well.
Place the cooked beans and peas in a large bowl. Add the cherry tomatoes, scallions, and cilantro.
Whisk together the vinegar and sweet chili sauce. Drizzle it over the vegetables, toss well, and serve.
